## Evidence — Node n1 (GitLab lane) — Issue #278

### RED (before implementation)
`node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/test-gitlab-forge-helpers.js`:
- TypeError: forge.deleteIssueNote is not a function (test line 146)
Failing tests:
1. deleteIssueNote: correct DELETE call — RED
2. clearAdvisoryClaim: project-scoped match deletes only target marker — RED
3. clearAdvisoryClaim: generic-regex fallback deletes all project= markers — RED
4. clearAdvisoryClaim: non-marker notes from other sessions not deleted — RED
5. clearAdvisoryClaim: OFFLINE mode makes no network calls — RED

### GREEN (after implementation)
All 5 new tests + prior tests pass; exit 0.
"GitLab forge helper tests passed", "All clearAdvisoryClaim marker-deletion tests passed", "GitLab workflow script tests passed".

### Files changed (3, all in declared write set)
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-forge.js: added deleteIssueNote(project, issueIid, noteId, opts) -> glabExec(['api','--method','DELETE','projects/<id>/issues/<iid>/notes/<noteId>']); exported it. Mirrors updateIssueNote incl. opts.execFileSync seam.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-claim.js: clearAdvisoryClaim signature +project slug (4th arg); after label removal + cleared note, lists notes, deletes kw:claim marker (project-scoped `<!-- kw:claim project=<slug> -->` preferred, generic /<!--\s*kw:claim\s+project=/ fallback), try/catch never-throws, OFFLINE guarded. Updated all 4 call sites (finalize=args.project; discard/release, MR-merged, MR-closed=folder.project). Exported clearAdvisoryClaim.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/test-gitlab-forge-helpers.js: 5 new assertions (RED-first).

### Verification
node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/test-gitlab-forge-helpers.js -> exit 0 (GREEN). Marker-deletion contract mirrors GitHub #275.
